zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne於大約1135年出生在法國布格o-達迪喬時，她的父親Hugues II duc de Bourgogne51歲，母親Mathilde de Mayenne43歲。她和Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier至少有4個兒子和6個女兒。她去世於1173年9月29日之前在法國藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯塔-吉加洛布易拉阿。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne于大约1135年出生在法国布格o-達迪喬时，她的父亲Hugues II duc de Bourgogne51岁，母亲Mathilde de Mayenne43岁。她和Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier至少有4个儿子和6个女儿。她去世于1173年9月29日之前在法国藍多-盧希隆賀勞爾特蒙培利也，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯塔-吉加洛布易拉阿。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile.
Americanized form of French   Bourgoin  .

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.
French:

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: et
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heang, Heng, Chheng, Eng, Kheng, Khun, Sang, Seng, Sung.  Vietnamese Anh, Hoa, Huong, Mang, Thao, Thong.  Spanish Angelita, Arturo, Enrique, Guillermo, Renato, Rosario.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 戴, see   Dai   1.
Vietnamese (Tề): from the Chinese surname 齊, see Qi 1.

variants.name: Dai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Cheng, Chi, Jin, Weimin, Xing, Zheng, Chung, Dong, Hong, Meng, Ning, Peihua.  Vietnamese Hung, Quang, Thanh, Anh, Cuong, Dai, Khanh, Lam Van, Minh, Mui, Nghia, Ngoc.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 戴, meaning ‘respect, support’ in Chinese: (i) from Dai (戴), the posthumous title of Duke Dai of Song (ruler of the state of Song, reigned 799–766  BC ). (ii) from Dai (戴), the name of an ancient state (located in Henan province). After it was annexed by the state of Zheng in 713  BC , the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (iii) adopted in place of another Chinese surname, Yin (殷), because they shared a similar meaning, ‘deep feeling’, in ancient Chinese.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 代, meaning ‘historical periods’ in Chinese: (i) from Dai (代), the name of an ancient state (located in Hebei province). After it was annexed by the state of Zhao during the Warring States period (475–221  BC ), the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) traced back to the Dai (代) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’.

variants.name: Mechtild
meanings: from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’.

nameMeanings.name: Marguerite
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Margaret , also used in the English-speaking world, where its use has been reinforced by the fact that the name was adopted in the 19th century for a garden flower, a large cultivated variety of daisy. Margaret was earlier used in English as a dialect word denoting the ox-eye daisy, and the French equivalent was borrowed into English just in time to catch the vogue for deriving girls' names from vocabulary words denoting flowers. See also Daisy .

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne was born about 1135, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France, her father, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, was 51 and her mother, Mathilde de Mayenne, was 43. She had at least 4 sons and 6 daughters with Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier. She died before 29 September 1173, in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, and was buried in Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne est née environ 1135, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France, son père, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, avait 51 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Mayenne, avait 43 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles avec Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier. Elle est décédée avant 29 septembre 1173, à Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, France, et a été enterrée à Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne um 1135 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues II duc de Bourgogne 51 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Mayenne 43. Sie hatte mit Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb vor 29. September 1173 in Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Frankreich und wurde in Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne è nata il circa 1135 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, sua padre, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, aveva 51 anni e sua madre, Mathilde de Mayenne, aveva 43 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie con Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier. Morì prima del 29 settembre 1173, nel Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, e fu sepolta a Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenneが約1135年にフランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Hugues II duc de Bourgogneは51歳，母Mathilde de Mayenneは43歳であった。彼女はGuillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllierとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1173年9月29日以前にフランスラングエドク-ロウシロンheラウルトモントペリールで死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスターン-エト-ガーオンボウイラックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne(이)가 대략 1135년 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues II duc de Bourgogne(은)는 51세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Mayenne(은)는 43세였다. 그녀는 Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1173년 9월 29일 이전 프랑스 랭도c-루시런 he라트 몽펠리어에서 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 터아른-트-가니 부이라크에 묻혔다.

mn.about 1135–before 29 September 1173: ойролцоогоор 1135 он–1173 оны Есдүгээр сарын 29–наас өмнө

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne nasceu aproximadamente 1135, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, tinha 51 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Mayenne, tinha 43 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas com Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier. Ela faleceu antes 29 de setembro de 1173, em Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, França, e foi sepultada em Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne родилась около 1135 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues II duc de Bourgogne было 51 год, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Mayenne, 43. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей от Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier. Она умерла перед 29 сентябрь 1173 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, лангуедок-руссиллон, Франция и была похоронена в местности боуиллак, тарн-ет-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

sm.about 1135–before 29 September 1173: e tusa o le 1135–a'e le'I oo le 29 Setema 1173

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mathilde Marguerite de Bourgogne et de Mayenne nació aproximadamente 1135, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia, su papá, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, tenía 51 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Mayenne, tenía 43 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas con Guillaume VII de Montpellier Seigneur de Montpéllier. Murió antes de 29 de septiembre de 1173, en Montpellier, Hérault, Languedoc-Roussillon, Francia, y fue sepultada en Bouillac, Tarn-et-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
